title: The Hartford Financial Services Group, Inc. (HIG) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call Transcript

My name is Abby and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Hartford Financial (HIG) Q3 Earnings Beat on Commercial Lines Unit
text: Hartford Financial's (HIG) Q3 results reflect growing premiums in the Group Benefits business and improved net investment income, partly offset by higher expenses.

title: The Hartford (HIG) Reports Q3 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: The Hartford Announces Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford (NYSE: HIG) today announced financial results for the quarter ended Sept. 30, 2023. “The Hartford continues to deliver strong financial performance with a 12-month core earnings ROE of 14.9 percent," said The Hartford's Chairman and CEO Christopher Swift. title: Will Rate Hikes Aid Hartford Financial's (HIG) Q3 Earnings?
text: Hartford Financial's (HIG) Q3 results are expected to benefit from new business growth in the Commercial Lines unit, partly offset by higher severity losses in the auto insurance business.

title: Hartford Financial Stock Lost 4% YTD, Is Correction In The Cards?
